title: Ubiquiti UA-Retrofit-Reader-W, Card reader for Retrofit Hub
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative The Ubiquiti UniFi Access UA-Retrofit-Reader-W is a contactless NFC card reader designed for use with the UA-Retrofit-Hub-2 , with support for daisy-chaining up to 2 readers per door. It communicates with the hub using the secure OSDP v2 protocol over the RS-485 interface NFC card/keyfob Apple/Google Wallet Via mobile application Device Mount Cover frame Mounting accessories
specsSearch: Power Power type DC terminal Max. power consumption [W] 2,5 Power via connector/terminal 12V DC
